evidence_direction_note: 2026-05-11 reclassification anchor: per-seed action_class_entropy=0.0 in every condition (seed=42 only action 0; seed=7 only action 2; seed=13 only action 4 across the entire eval window). Under V_s monostrategy the trajectory through the env is deterministic given seed alone, so ON_INDEPENDENT (ARC-033 path, ResidualHarmForward) and ON_SHARED (ARC-058 path, HarmForwardTrunk+HarmForwardHead) consume the same z_harm_a stream and trivially fit a near-degenerate target. The c4_arc033_vs_arc058_diagnostic field records this: mean_r2_independent == mean_r2_shared == 0.8986271204935968 exactly, and the per-seed harm_a_forward_r2 + mean_score_bias_abs metrics are floating-point-identical between ON_INDEPENDENT and ON_SHARED (seed=42 -> 0.9371525719237495 / 3374526.2593920277; seed=7 -> 0.918056702809114 / 954306.9917550903; seed=13 -> 0.8406720867479271 / 86130.61802364363). The winner_suggested_by_forward_r2 tag is meaningless because the test is non-discriminative. The architectural arbitration ARC-033 vs ARC-058 requires balanced agent-vs-env event distributions for the two architectures to produce different forward_r2 readouts -- the same V_s monostrategy ceiling that has reclassified the SD-029 cohort (EXQ-433 / 433a / 433b / 470 / 433d / 433f / 537 / 537a / 523b) non_contributory. self_attribution_plan.md GAP-1 status updated from open to blocked on same upstream gates as GAP-2 (sleep_substrate Phase 1 PASS + MECH-269 V_s landing + MECH-307 conjunction architecture). MECH-258 / MECH-260 / SD-032b reads preserved at non_contributory (the within-arm criteria show what an untrained-policy monostrategy run fits trivially, not what the dACC bundle does when the policy actually exercises both event classes).

c1_forward_r2_substrate_ok.desc: both ON arms harm_a_forward_r2 >= 0.3 in >=2/3 seeds

c2_dacc_behavioural_effect.desc: |entropy_on - entropy_off| >= 0.1 in either ON arm, >=2/3 seeds

c3_mech260_no_collapse.desc: ON entropy >= OFF entropy in >=2/3 seeds for both arms

c4_arc033_vs_arc058_diagnostic.desc: diagnostic only -- informs governance arbitration, never fails run

evidence_direction_note: Reclassified non_contributory 2026-04-22: dACC analog substrate landed (UC1..UC5 PASS) but behavioural FAIL is monostrategy-blocked at the V_s landing layer. SD-032b cluster cannot be discriminated until MECH-269 (per-region V_s) lands and unlocks alternative operating modes.
